channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
item.description: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

item.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
item.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.

item.title: Taylor Farms pulls iceberg lettuce from the US market after cyclosporiasis outbreak
item.description: Food producer Taylor Farms released a statement on the Cyclospora outbreak Friday, confirming that it's "voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce sourced from central Mexico from the US market." Reuters reports that, according to a source, Taylor Farms told customers like Yum Brands owner Taco Bell and the food distributor Sysco on Thursday to pull shredded […]...

item.title: There's now an API for mainlining Trump's Truth Social posts
item.description: The API is supposed to deliver posts from 'the highest-ranking Truth Social accounts.'

item.title: The Odyssey has made IMAX 70mm a status symbol
item.description: Only 41 theaters can show "The Odyssey" in IMAX 70mm, Christopher Nolan's preferred format. Is that too exclusive?

item.title: Heartstopper Forever means everything to me
item.description: High school can't last forever, but "Heartstopper" will in spirit, with the beloved teen Netflix series taking a victory lap. Review.

item.title: Charge any device with this keychain, on sale now for $30
item.description: The GoCable is an 8-in-1 EDC cable that's on sale now for $29.99

item.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
item.description: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

item.title: 'My soul left my body': customers see bills in the billions after AWS billing system goes haywire — but don't go emptying your bank accounts
item.description: An Amazon AWS billing system accidentally told some customers they owed billions of dollars, but a fix is on the way.

item.title: ‘The Odyssey’: Box office predictions, review roundup, and Christopher Nolan’s big bet on movie theaters
item.description: As the first filmmaker to shoot a feature entirely on 65mm IMAX film cameras, the director is banking on the strength of the experience economy At a time when Hollywood needs a win, acclaimed filmmaker Christopher Nolan is again betting on the experience economy. His epic masterpiece The Odyssey hits theaters today (Friday, July 17) and is already projected to break box office records. ...

item.title: 'You're giving ballistic ⁠missiles to individuals with Mythos': JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's AI model poses some serious risks
item.description: Restricting Mythos to vetted organizations and keeping it out of the hands of the public seems to be the safest option for Anthropic, with JPMorgan CEO describing its risks as a “real issue.”

item.title: 'Superb for most home uses in an emergency': Jackery HomePower 3000 combines a huge 3,072Wh battery with enough power to run almost every appliance — and it's on sale right now
item.description: It combines a powerful 3,600W output with fast charging and solar compatibility.

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5000 Super GPUs rumored to be ready — but they're on hold, and the reason why makes me nervous about pricing
item.description: These Super refreshes are still coming, by all accounts, but they could make quite the dent in your bank balance.
